_instructions: Work experience timeline. 'logo' uses simpleicons.org or Google's favicon service.
subtitle: Where I've built things

experiences.title: AI Data Engineer
responsibilities: Developed distributed PySpark pipelines on Databricks and AWS S3 to process large-scale NLP training datasets for ML experimentation workflows.
Built real-time ingestion using Apache Kafka and Spark Structured Streaming to capture user interaction signals for analytics dashboards and model monitoring.
Designed dbt transformation models on Snowflake and BigQuery, orchestrated via Airflow DAGs — improving transformation reliability and warehouse query performance.
Implemented Python feature-engineering pipelines integrated with MLflow tracking to support reproducible ML experiments.
Maintained batch ingestion via AWS Glue and REST API integrations, landing external datasets into S3 and downstream warehouses.
Partnered with ML engineers and data scientists to standardize dataset schemas, metadata, and validation checks.

experiences.title: AI Data Engineer
responsibilities: Built distributed ETL pipelines using PySpark and Spark on Databricks with Azure Data Lake, processing high-volume financial transaction datasets.
Implemented incremental ingestion with Airflow and CDC-based extraction from PostgreSQL, improving data freshness and eliminating costly full reloads.
Designed dimensional warehouse schemas in Amazon Redshift and Snowflake, enabling scalable reporting pipelines.
Authored dbt transformation pipelines to standardize SQL transformations across the warehouse.
Containerized transformation services with Docker and shipped via Jenkins CI/CD integrated with GitHub.
Tuned Spark jobs and SQL queries to cut pipeline runtime and reduce failures via validation and monitoring checks.

experiences.title: Associate Data Engineer
responsibilities: Developed Python and SQL ETL pipelines ingesting SaaS application usage data into MySQL and BigQuery for internal analytics.
Supported Apache Spark batch transformations on semi-structured JSON telemetry generated by application services.
Configured and maintained Airflow DAGs for scheduled ingestion with monitoring alerts and retry logic to keep pipelines stable.
Investigated PostgreSQL query bottlenecks and added indexing strategies that improved reporting performance.
Helped stand up data validation checks and schema enforcement rules across analytics datasets.
